title: 10 best herbal creams for bronchitis
description: Eupatorium perfoliatum, also known as joe pye weed, creams helps with bronchitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the respiratory tract. The herb's expectorant properties also help to loosen and clear mucus, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, Eupatorium perfoliatum contains compounds that reduce inflammation and ease congestion, providing relief from bronchitis symptoms.
